body.docName: 单据自定义附件字段附件上传
body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/accessory/custom-field/upload 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/accessory/custom-field/upload 
 ## 接口描述 
支持单据自定义附件字段附件上传，并返回文件唯一编号，可结合单据自定义附件字段附件绑定接口使用。
上传附件单个大小不超过50M。
支持的文件类型为：.csv,.pdf, .zip, .rar, .gif,.bmp, .png, .jpg, .docx, .doc, .xlsx, .xls, .tif, .tiff, .jpg, .jpeg, .jpe, .jfif, .dib, .ppt, .pptx, .pub, .wps, .dps, .et, .pps, .csv, .heif, .heic 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: form-data 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"FILE","name":"file","required":true,"label":"%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E6%B5%81"}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"uploaderNumber","label":"%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E4%BA%BA%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"01071828","desc":"%20%E5%8F%96%E5%80%BC%E8%8A%B1%E5%90%8D%E5%86%8C%E4%B8%AD%E7%9A%84%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E5%8F%B7","required":true}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"fileId","required":false,"label":"%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"c35397d6-5234-4fb2-b874-625951f475c9","desc":"%20%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80%E9%94%AE"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%A0%87%E5%BF%97","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"errorMessage","required":false,"label":"%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E6%8A%A5%E9%94%99%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E5%8D%95%E4%B8%AA%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%E5%A4%A7%E5%B0%8F%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%8750M","desc":""}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 {BaseURL}/v1/accessory/custom-field/upload?uploaderNumber=01071828
注意文件上传，参数file
### 请求报文
无
### 响应报文
```json
{  
    "fileId": "c35397d6-5234-4fb2-b874-625951f475c9",
    "success": true,
    "errorMessage":null
} 
```  
## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|
  | --- | --- |
  | 200| 成功|
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/accessory/custom-field/upload

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/accessory/custom-field/upload

接口描述

支持单据自定义附件字段附件上传，并返回文件唯一编号，可结合单据自定义附件字段附件绑定接口使用。 上传附件单个大小不超过50M。 支持的文件类型为：.csv,.pdf, .zip, .rar, .gif,.bmp, .png, .jpg, .docx, .doc, .xlsx, .xls, .tif, .tiff, .jpg, .jpeg, .jpe, .jfif, .dib, .ppt, .pptx, .pub, .wps, .dps, .et, .pps, .csv, .heif, .heic

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: FORM-DATA

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"FILE","name":"file","required":true,"label":"%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E6%B5%81"}}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"uploaderNumber","label":"%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E4%BA%BA%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"01071828","desc":"%20%E5%8F%96%E5%80%BC%E8%8A%B1%E5%90%8D%E5%86%8C%E4%B8%AD%E7%9A%84%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E5%8F%B7","required":true}}]}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"fileId","required":false,"label":"%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"c35397d6-5234-4fb2-b874-625951f475c9","desc":"%20%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80%E9%94%AE"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%A0%87%E5%BF%97","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"errorMessage","required":false,"label":"%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E6%8A%A5%E9%94%99%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E5%8D%95%E4%B8%AA%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%E5%A4%A7%E5%B0%8F%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%8750M","desc":""}}]}]}

接口调用示例

{BaseURL}/v1/accessory/custom-field/upload?uploaderNumber=01071828 注意文件上传，参数file

请求报文

无

响应报文

{  
    "fileId": "c35397d6-5234-4fb2-b874-625951f475c9",
    "success": true,
    "errorMessage":null
}

错误码说明

错误码 错误信息
200 成功
